description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu spent 29 hrs 43 mins coding, with a daily average of 4 hrs 4 mins. On GitHub, he opened 11 pull requests in qiuethan/Misty, from #107 through #117. His tracked work also included Python, Markdown, TypeScript, and SQL across 4 projects.
